generated_oml:
// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VisualDiagnostics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual diagnostics highlight anomalies and performance bottlenecks in the 3D view."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecast : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecast of building energy consumption based on sensor trends and predictive models."
]

instance LightingSetpointRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation of optimal lighting set‑points to balance comfort and energy efficiency."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting levels via command signals to lighting control units.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergySavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggested action for facility managers to implement additional energy‑saving measures.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard aggregates live sensor streams and actuator states for facility managers.",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualDiagnostics
]

instance Interactive3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive UE5 visualization of the building twin with real‑time data overlay.",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualDiagnostics
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Applies machine learning to forecast energy consumption and lighting needs.",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecast,
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingSetpointRecommendation
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes lighting and HVAC set‑points to reduce energy usage.",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecast,
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingSetpointRecommendation,
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingAction
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement‑learning based adaptive lighting control sending commands to actuators.",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingAdjustment
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs design‑time simulations using the enriched BIM and runtime semantics.",
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingSetpointRecommendation,
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecast
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono provides MQTT/HTTPS ingestion of sensor measurements from the physical building.",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard,
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualization,
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService,
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService,
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingControlService,
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto manages the digital‑thing state, model versions, and command dispatch for actuators.",
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingControlService,
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 renders immersive 3D visualization of the building twin.",
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualization
]

instance MDEPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑driven engineering pipeline automates generation of Ditto/Hono artefacts from enriched BIM.",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard,
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingControlService
]

instance BIMAuthoringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools create the enriched BIM geometry, topology, and spatial relationships.",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard,
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched BIM containing geometry, topology, spatial relationships and device metadata.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEPipeline,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringTool
]

instance RuntimeSemanticsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime semantics defining sensor configurations, control logic, and command schemas stored in Eclipse Ditto.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEPipeline
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance LightSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance OccupancyDetectorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancyDetector
]

instance EnergyMeterDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

instance EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor embedded in the building, providing real-time illuminance measurements.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancyDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy detector embedded in rooms, reporting presence status to the twin.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDetectorDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy meter measuring electrical consumption of building zones.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyMeterDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring temperature and humidity for climate control.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted
]

// C2: Acting components
instance LightingControlUnit : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting control unit receives command signals from the DT to adjust illumination levels."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuator modulates heating, ventilation, and air conditioning based on DT commands."
]

instance BuildingControlDevice : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "General building control system device handling various control signals."
]

// C10: Data instances
instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Illuminance measurement data from LightSensor.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightSensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy detection data from OccupancyDetector.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDetectorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Energy consumption readings from EnergyMeter.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyMeterDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental parameters (temperature, humidity) from EnvironmentalSensor.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OperationalDataset : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational dataset composed of live sensor streams and actuator states used for analytics.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelData,
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyData,
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionData,
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalData
]

// C14: Environment (physical asset)
instance LivingLabAcademicBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightSensor,
    base:contains OccupancyDetector,
    base:contains EnergyMeter,
    base:contains EnvironmentalSensor,
    base:contains LightingControlUnit,
    base:contains HVACActuator,
    base:contains BuildingControlDevice
]

// C9: Multiplicities – hierarchical twins
instance BuildingTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building‑level digital twin aggregating all device‑level twins.",
    base:contains LightSensorTwin,
    base:contains OccupancyDetectorTwin,
    base:contains EnergyMeterTwin,
    base:contains EnvironmentalSensorTwin,
    base:contains LightingControlUnitTwin,
    base:contains HVACActuatorTwin,
    base:contains BuildingControlDeviceTwin
]

instance LightSensorTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Device‑level twin representing a single LightSensor."
]

instance OccupancyDetectorTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Device‑level twin representing a single OccupancyDetector."
]

instance EnergyMeterTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Device‑level twin representing a single EnergyMeter."
]

instance EnvironmentalSensorTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Device‑level twin representing a single EnvironmentalSensor."
]

instance LightingControlUnitTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Twin of the LightingControlUnit actuator."
]

instance HVACActuatorTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Twin of the HVACActuator actuator."
]

instance BuildingControlDeviceTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Twin of the generic BuildingControlDevice actuator."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional command flow from the DT to physical devices through Eclipse Ditto, which forwards control commands (e.g., lighting set-points, HVAC adjustments) to the actuators via the Hono middleware."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Near real-time operation with continuous data exchange; the twin processes incoming sensor streams and issues control commands on a sub-second to second timescale."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An integrated stack where the enriched BIM model feeds a configurator that generates Hono/Ditto artifacts; Hono ingests sensor data, Ditto maintains the twin state, and Unreal Engine visualizes the state; custom services plug into defined extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the full building lifecycle: design (BIM model creation), construction (model enrichment with device metadata), commissioning, operation (real-time monitoring and control), and post-occupancy optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is applied to quantify how closely the twin reflects the physical building, providing a systematic fidelity assessment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Uses Eclipse Hono’s MQTT (and optionally HTTPS) transport to collect sensor data, and Ditto’s REST/WS APIs for twin state access and command issuance; all components communicate over standard IP networks."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Leverages BIM as a standardized data backbone (e.g., IFC-compatible semantics) and adopts open, standards-based middleware (Eclipse Hono, Eclipse Ditto) with defined extension points to ensure interoperability."
]
